QuartzRestApi
Table of Contents

Namespace QuartzRestApi.Wrappers

Classes

GroupMatcher<T>

Json wrapper for the Quartz Quartz.Impl.Matchers.GroupMatcher<TKey>

JobDetail

Json wrapper for the Quartz Quartz.IJobDetail

JobDetailWithTrigger

Json wrapper to create a Quartz.IJob with a Quartz.ITrigger

JobDetailWithTriggers

Json wrapper to create a Quartz.IJob with a list of Quartz.ITriggers

JobExecutionContext

Json wrapper for the Quartz Quartz.IJobExecutionContext

JobExecutionContexts

Json wrapper for a list of Quartz Quartz.IJobExecutionContexts

JobKey

A json wrapper for the Quartz.JobKey

JobKeyWithDataMap

Json wrapper to create a Quartz.JobKey with a Quartz.JobDataMap

JobKeys

A list of Quartz.JobKeys

Key

A json wrapper for the Quartz.TriggerKey or Quartz.JobKey

RescheduleJob

Class used to read or create json to reschedule a job

RunningJobs
ScheduleJobs

Json wrapper to schedule multiple Quartz.IJobs each with their own set of Quartz.ITriggers. Maps to ScheduleJobs(IReadOnlyDictionary<IJobDetail, IReadOnlyCollection<ITrigger>>, bool, CancellationToken).

SchedulerContext

A json wrapper for the Quartz.SchedulerContext

SchedulerMetaData

Class used to read or create json to get the schedulers meta-data

Trigger

Class used to create or read json to get a trigger with a job key and data map

TriggerKey

A json wrapper for the Quartz.TriggerKey

TriggerKeys
Triggers

A list of Quartz.ITriggers

Enums

GroupMatcherType

The matching type
